name: Mt. Moriah Auto Sales
description_short: Pre-owned vehicle dealership in Memphis, TN with 106 vehicles in stock, on-site financing pre-approval, service, and parts departments.
description_long:
Mt. Moriah Auto Sales is a pre-owned vehicle dealership located at 2571 Mount Moriah Rd in Memphis, Tennessee. The dealership serves the Memphis metropolitan area including nearby Collierville, and explicitly welcomes out-of-area buyers to visit the city and its lot. The business operates a full-service used car operation with separate sales, service, and parts departments, each with distinct operating hours.

The dealership carries approximately 106 used vehicles spanning a wide range of makes — from mainstream brands like Chevrolet, Ford, Toyota, Nissan, and Jeep to luxury and premium marques including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, Porsche, Maserati, and Land Rover. Inventory is searchable by year (2001–2025), make, model, body style, and price range. Price bands start at $5,001–$10,000 and extend to $60,001 or more, with a dedicated 'Under 15k' quick-filter for budget-conscious shoppers. Customers can apply for financing online through a 'Get Pre-Approved' portal, schedule test drives, and browse current specials on the website.

Several features distinguish the dealership's consumer experience. The site supports Spanish-language browsing (Español toggle), indicating the dealership actively serves Spanish-speaking customers in the Memphis area. Parts are available seven days a week — including Sundays from 10AM to 6PM — which is uncommon for independent used car lots. The breadth of luxury inventory (Porsche, Maserati, Land Rover Range Rover variants) alongside budget under-$15K options suggests the lot targets a wide income range rather than a single buyer segment.

IMPORTANT CATEGORIZATION NOTE: Mt. Moriah Auto Sales is a used vehicle retailer, not a personal loan lender. It appears on a consumer finance directory primarily because it offers vehicle financing pre-approval, which acts as indirect auto lending. There is no 'auto-loans' category available in this directory. Consumers seeking standalone personal loans should look elsewhere. This profile is most useful for buyers who need both a vehicle and financing in one place, particularly those with credit challenges who benefit from dealer-arranged financing.
pros: Large used inventory of ~106 vehicles searchable by year, make, model, price, and body style
Budget-friendly options with a dedicated 'Under 15k' search filter starting at $5,001
Luxury and premium brands in stock including BMW, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, and Maserati
Online 'Get Pre-Approved' financing application available before visiting the lot
Spanish-language website support for bilingual Memphis-area customers
Parts department open 7 days a week including Sundays 10AM–6PM
Extended weekday sales hours until 7PM Monday through Thursday
cons: Used vehicles only — no new car inventory
No pricing listed on homepage; customers must browse individual listings
Single location only — no multi-location convenience
Website 'About Us' is generic boilerplate — no ownership history, years in business, or staff bios provided
best_for: Memphis-area buyers seeking a used vehicle across a wide price range ($5K–$60K+)
Budget shoppers specifically looking for vehicles under $15,000
Buyers wanting dealer-arranged financing without going to a bank separately
Spanish-speaking car buyers in the Memphis and Collierville area
diagnosis: Mt. Moriah Auto Sales is best for Memphis-area consumers who need a used vehicle — especially budget buyers under $15K or those seeking dealer-arranged financing in one visit. The main caveat is that this is a used car dealership, not a consumer lending company; anyone seeking a personal cash loan should look at actual lenders rather than this listing.
services: Used vehicle sales (106+ vehicles in inventory)
Advanced inventory search by year, make, model, body style, and price range
Stock number search for returning shoppers
